semantic.role: LLM prompt template generator for architectural violation fixes.
responsibilities: Defines the data structure (FixViolationContext) for violation context needed to generate a fix prompt.
Formats violation details and file context into a structured instructional prompt for an LLM assistant.
outOfScope: Does not execute or run the fix; only generates the prompt.
Does not parse or validate source code beyond formatting the provided context.
Does not communicate with external services or persist data.
invariants: Must not import CLI entrypoints or service-level orchestration modules (engine-independence rule).
Must remain decoupled from presentation and orchestration concerns.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable engine function to generate LLM prompts for fixing architectural violations, keeping the module thin and independent.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Not directly related; this file unchanged in recent commit (commit about fixing TTY hang, retry crash, Windows compat).

English.role: LLM prompt template generator for architectural violation fixes.
responsibilities: Defines the data structure (FixViolationContext) for violation context needed to generate a fix prompt.
Formats violation details and file context into a structured instructional prompt for an LLM assistant.
outOfScope: Does not execute or run the fix; only generates the prompt.
Does not parse or validate source code beyond formatting the provided context.
Does not communicate with external services or persist data.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于架构违规修复的 LLM 提示模板生成器。
responsibilities: 定义 FixViolationContext 数据结构，以封装生成修复提示所需的违规上下文。
将违规详情和文件上下文格式化为结构化的指令性提示，供 LLM 助手使用。
outOfScope: 不执行或运行修复，仅生成提示。
不解析或验证源代码，仅格式化提供的上下文。
不与外部服务通信或持久化数据。
